_comment: Optional few-shot examples the REAL model sees (the agent prepends them). Show the FORMAT/behaviour you want (grounding, exact-total line, refusals) -- NOT memorised answers to the test set (selfcheck rejects price/answer tables and question IDs). Keep it short: long prompts cost tokens and lose S_prompt.

examples.question: Mua 1 AirPods dung ma WINNER, ship Ha Noi, tong cong bao nhieu?
examples.ideal_answer: AirPods hiện hết hàng nên không thể đặt mua.

examples.question: Mua 2 iPad ap dung ma SALE15 giao den Da Nang, tong cong?
examples.ideal_answer:
iPad: 2 cái, đơn giá 18.000.000 VND. Giảm giá 15%. Ship Đà Nẵng: 35.000 VND.
Tong cong: 30635000 VND
